title: Replace Elements with Greatest Element on Right Side
titleCn: 将每个元素替换为右侧最大元素

testcases.input: arr = [17,18,5,4,6,1] Output: [18,6,6,6,1,-1] Explanation: - index 0 --> the greatest element to the right of index 0 is index 1 (18). - index 1 --> the greatest element to the right of index 1 is index 4 (6). - index 2 --> the greatest element to the right of index 2 is index 4 (6). - index 3 --> the greatest element to the right of index 3 is index 4 (6). - index 4 --> the greatest element to the right of index 4 is index 5 (1). - index 5 --> there are no elements to the right of index 5, so we put -1.
testcases.expectedOutput: [18,6,6,6,1,-1] Explanation: - index 0 --> the greatest element to the right of index 0 is index 1 (18). - index 1 --> the greatest element to the right of index 1 is index 4 (6). - index 2 --> the greatest element to the right of index 2 is index 4 (6). - index 3 --> the greatest element to the right of index 3 is index 4 (6). - index 4 --> the greatest element to the right of index 4 is index 5 (1). - index 5 --> there are no elements to the right of index 5, so we put -1.

testcases.input: arr = [400] Output: [-1] Explanation: There are no elements to the right of index 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: [-1] Explanation: There are no elements to the right of index 0.
